title: AI/ML Engineer
description:
Job Summary

This role focuses on building and deploying cutting-edge GenAI and Language AI capabilities to enhance the media content discovery and consumption experience across a global, multilingual user base. The engineer will work on LLMs, agentic workflows, and production-level ML systems, collaborating across a multi-disciplinary team and deploying to millions of users across various platforms.


Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and maintain Language AI capabilities to support, understand, and grow global markets for a variety of digital services.
  • Work on innovative projects to help users discover and engage with media content through advanced content intelligence.
  • Contribute to next-generation Generative AI features across devices and platforms, supporting millions of users and billions of interactions.
  • Enhance content discovery and consumption experience through machine learning solutions.
  • Deploy features, code, data, and models into production environments.
  • Collaborate closely with world-class engineers, researchers, and analysts to ensure the quality and performance of deployed models.
  • Deliver solutions that support millions of devices globally, across operating systems such as mobile, desktop, smart TVs, wearables, and voice assistants.
  • Ensure language coverage across a wide variety of regions and cultures.

Key Qualifications

  • 2+ years of relevant industry experience
  • Strong programming skills in Python
  • Hands-on experience building Agentic workflows and GenAI applications
  • Experience with Machine Learning techniques and related project work
  • A genuine passion for building high-impact user experiences

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified / contacted.


EA Registration No.: FOO CHONG YUAN AARON, R25145979

Allegis Group Singapore Pte Ltd, Company Reg No. 200909448N, EA License No. 10C4544
